notes: Passive - reads video IDs from [data-e2e="user-post-item"] and [data-e2e="user-repost-item"] cards, decodes the embedded creation timestamp from each video ID's bits, and appends a '.tiktok-description-added' div with the date plus the image alt-text to each card, then adds a '.myosint-attribution-badge' div with 'Modified by a Bookmarklet'. Generous wait_ms for TikTok's lazy-loaded video grid to render. Fails with alert('No TikTok video or repost cards found on this page.') or alert('No video or repost descriptions found to add.') if the grid isn't populated - TikTok profile pages can be slow/variable in CI so this may need wait_ms tuning.

checks.comment: Attribution badge appears after descriptions are added
At least one video card got a date/description overlay
